description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a series of evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its top surface, creating a striped pattern. The grooves are deep and dark, contrasting with the lighter, speckled stone material that fills the spaces between them. The block has a solid, robust appearance, with clean, straight edges and a uniform thickness. The sides of the block are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the functional, utilitarian design. The top surface's pattern suggests it may serve as a drainage or anti-slip feature, commonly found in urban environments. The overall look is modern and industrial, suitable for integration into sidewalks, plazas, or public spaces.
description: A rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface, creating a striped, anti-slip pattern. The block is solid, with smooth sides and a speckled stone finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the horizontal grooves running across the top surface, with the block's thickness and smooth front edge visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and spacing of the vertical grooves, emphasizing the striped pattern and the block's solid profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the horizontal grooves and the block's uniform thickness.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the vertical grooves and the block's robust, rectangular form.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a drainage or anti-slip barrier
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set flush with pavement
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained, with no signs of erosion or discoloration.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: set flush with adjacent pavement or stone blocks
